UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, BANISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 181 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** **THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
